mapper.select: select * from jst_appointment_record where appointment_id = #{appointmentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select ar.* from jst_appointment_record ar left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = ar.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' where ar.appointment_id = #{appointmentId} and ar.del_flag = '0' and (ar.user_id = #{userId} or p.user_id = #{userId} or p.claimed_user_id = #{userId}) limit 1

select ar.appointment_id as appointmentId, ar.contest_id as contestId, c.contest_name as contestName, ar.appointment_date as appointmentDate, ar.session_code as sessionCode, ar.main_status as mainStatus, ar.appointment_type as appointmentType, case when ar.appointment_type = 'individual' then 1 else 0 end as individualAppointment, case when ar.appointment_type = 'team' then 1 else 0 end as teamAppointment, ar.team_appointment_id as teamAppointmentId, t.team_no as teamNo, t.team_name as teamName from jst_appointment_record ar left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = ar.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join jst_team_appointment t on t.team_appointment_id = ar.team_appointment_id and t.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = ar.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' where ar.del_flag = '0' and (ar.user_id = #{userId} or p.user_id = #{userId} or p.claimed_user_id = #{userId}) order by ar.appointment_date desc, ar.appointment_id desc

select ar.appointment_id as appointmentId, ar.contest_id as contestId, c.contest_name as contestName, ar.participant_id as participantId, p.name as participantName, ar.appointment_date as appointmentDate, ar.session_code as sessionCode, ar.main_status as mainStatus, ar.appointment_type as appointmentType, case when ar.appointment_type = 'individual' then 1 else 0 end as individualAppointment, case when ar.appointment_type = 'team' then 1 else 0 end as teamAppointment, ar.team_appointment_id as teamAppointmentId, t.team_no as teamNo, t.team_name as teamName, ar.qr_code as qrCode from jst_appointment_record ar left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = ar.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join jst_team_appointment t on t.team_appointment_id = ar.team_appointment_id and t.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = ar.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' where ar.appointment_id = #{appointmentId} and ar.del_flag = '0' and (ar.user_id = #{userId} or p.user_id = #{userId} or p.claimed_user_id = #{userId}) limit 1
select count(1) from jst_appointment_writeoff_item where appointment_id = #{appointmentId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from jst_appointment_writeoff_item where appointment_id = #{appointmentId} and del_flag = '0' and status = 'used'
